title: adonis × cullellii
intro: Adonis × cullellii, also known as Adonis pyrenaica, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Adonis, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and toxic properties. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Adonis × cullellii include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures or infusions, although its toxic properties necessitate careful handling and dosing.
